title: Junior Business Development Manager at Vestian

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Vestian
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? Vestian in Tiruchirappalli offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Vestian:
Vestian is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vestian!
